---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for LocalMeshAI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that LocalMeshAI doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. If it's a new **helper feature**, list its parameters (in mm) and
whether it's additive / subtractive / glue-on.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you could achieve this.

## Which milestone does this fit?

See [docs/ROADMAP.md](../docs/ROADMAP.md). [e.g. Milestone 2 — Helper primitives]

## Additional context

Sketches, reference images, or example STLs welcome.
